report.summary: No new commits today; codebase stable on Apr 2 build (e3f63fc). 729 published pages, 111 missing page.tsx (known backlog). 141 TS errors across 4 files (non-blocking). All 6 API routes structurally healthy; defi-yields still lacks in-memory cache/fallback.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: TypeScript check: 141 errors across 4 files — lido-v3-stvaults-guide (94), structured-data.examples.ts (40), crypto-arbitrage-strategies-guide (4), rwa-yield-vs-defi-yield-comparison (3). Non-blocking: ignoreBuildErrors:true in next.config.ts.
Published pages audit: 729 slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES, 111 missing page.tsx files. Known scaffolding backlog — no regressions since last cycle.
No new pages built or published since last cycle (last commit: Apr 2).
No regressions detected. Delta from prior cycle: zero.

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: All 6 API route files present and structurally sound.
prices: HEALTHY — 60s TTL, in-memory cache, revalidate=60.
trending: HEALTHY — 300s TTL, in-memory cache, revalidate=600.
fear-greed: HEALTHY — 600s TTL, in-memory cache, revalidate=1200.
market-metrics: HEALTHY — 60s TTL, in-memory cache, revalidate=120.
market-dominance: EXCELLENT — 300s TTL, three-tier fallback (fresh/stale/hardcoded).
defi-yields: WARNING — no in-memory CACHE_TTL/STALE_TTL, no hardcoded FALLBACK_DATA. Uses CDN cache (300s) only. Vulnerable to upstream DefiLlama outages.
Live endpoint verification not possible (network egress blocked from sandbox).

sections.title: DevOps
items: Latest production deploy: commit e3f63fc (Apr 2) — 4 learn guides, 8 OG images, stablecoin yield tracker.
No new deploys this cycle. Production stable.
Vercel project confirmed: prj_2Hn4Kdtu6fM13sSpxsdnmsJWGI75 (cryptodegen).
Build config: standalone output, 8GB heap, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency:4, ignoreBuildErrors:true.
Live site health unverifiable from sandbox (egress blocked). No reported incidents.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: Shipped this cycle: Nothing new — no commits since Apr 2.

Carry-over: defi-yields API needs resilience upgrade (in-memory cache + fallback data).
Carry-over: 141 TS errors in 4 files (3 learn pages + structured-data.examples.ts).
